meta.title: Full Dataset Cross-Reference Map
meta.boundary: This map shows symbolic design relationships, not psychological measurements, diagnosis, prediction, or human scoring.

relationshipTypes.buffer: One formula softens, stabilizes, or contextualizes another.
relationshipTypes.amplifier: One formula can increase the pressure or story force of another.
relationshipTypes.repair_path: One formula suggests a clearer, kinder, or more accountable next step.
relationshipTypes.contrast: The formulas help define each other by difference.
relationshipTypes.sequence: One formula often leads into the next in story, dialogue, or reflection.
relationshipTypes.example_pair: Strong pair for compare mode or teaching examples.

Calm offers safety, breath, and simplicity as a symbolic buffer for fear mapping.
Grief and love share memory, absence, care, and continuity language.
Joy and wonder both grow when presence slows enough to notice what is alive.
Curiosity can create the first safe steps that later become evidence and confidence.
Resentment tracks unpaid harm; guilt repair can move the ledger toward accountability.

learningPaths.title: Fear to Calm Path
learningPaths.description: A gentle symbolic path from threat mapping toward grounding, support, and possible relief.
learningPaths.boundaryNote: This path is a symbolic reflection/design sequence, not clinical anxiety guidance.

learningPaths.title: Boundary to Repair Path
learningPaths.description: A path from violated need toward clarity, accountability, compassion, and repair.
learningPaths.boundaryNote: This path does not excuse harm or force reconciliation.

learningPaths.title: Comedy / Drama Mirror Path
learningPaths.description: A path showing how similar structures can become laughter or tension depending on context.
learningPaths.boundaryNote: These are craft mirrors, not emotional rankings.

learningPaths.title: Grief to Wonder Path
learningPaths.description: A gentle path where memory, witness, presence, and wonder can coexist without forced positivity.
learningPaths.boundaryNote: Grief has no deadline; this path is not a schedule or solution.

learningPaths.title: Curiosity to Confidence Path
learningPaths.description: A learning path from mystery and permission into evidence, skill, and earned confidence.
learningPaths.boundaryNote: This is a learning-design path, not a productivity score or diagnosis.
